allow: Bash(find /c/Repo/Personal/Games/Satori -maxdepth 2 -not -path */.git* -not -path */.godot*)
Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/setup-plan.ps1" -Json)
Bash(ls:*)
Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/update-agent-context.ps1" -AgentType claude)

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Dev tooling and debug test harness for in-editor game testing" -Json -ShortName "dev-tooling-harness" "Dev Tooling and Test Harness")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Infinite coordinate-based tile grid with chunk-based world partitioning" -Json -ShortName "infinite-grid-engine" "Infinite Grid Engine")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Tile placement with organic adjacency rules and long-press interaction" -Json -ShortName "tile-placement-adjacency" "Tile Placement and Organic Adjacency")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Biome alchemy mixing and locking system for hybrid biome creation" -Json -ShortName "biome-alchemy-mixing" "Biome Alchemy Mixing and Locking")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Background pattern matching engine for spatial discovery detection" -Json -ShortName "pattern-matching-engine" "Pattern Matching Engine")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Tier 1 biome cluster discoveries with audio triggers" -Json -ShortName "tier1-biome-discoveries" "Tier 1 Biome Cluster Discoveries")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Tier 2 structural landmark discoveries triggered by geometric shape recipes" -Json -ShortName "tier2-structural-landmarks" "Tier 2 Structural Landmark Discoveries")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Tier 3 spirit animal autonomous entity system with multi-variable summon conditions" -Json -ShortName "spirit-animal-system" "Tier 3 Spirit Animal System")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Voxel tile rendering with bitmask autotiling and cluster mesh merging" -Json -ShortName "voxel-rendering-merging" "Voxel Rendering and Mesh Merging")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Touch-first camera with momentum panning and mobile thumb-zone navigation" -Json -ShortName "camera-mobile-nav" "Camera and Mobile Navigation")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Ambient soundscape system with per-biome audio and proximity blending" -Json -ShortName "ambient-soundscape" "Ambient Soundscape System")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Garden state persistence with auto-save and load on startup" -Json -ShortName "garden-persistence" "Garden Persistence Save and Load")

Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Accessibility options and settings screen for haptics, colorblind mode, and audio" -Json -ShortName "accessibility-settings" "Accessibility and Settings Screen")
Bash(pwsh .specify/scripts/powershell/check-prerequisites.ps1 -Json)
Bash(pwsh .specify/scripts/powershell/check-prerequisites.ps1 -Json -RequireTasks -IncludeTasks)
Bash(find C:RepoPersonalGamesSatorisrc C:RepoPersonalGamesSatoriscenes -name *.gd -o -name *.tscn)
Bash(where godot:*)
Read(//c/Program Files/**)
Read(//c/Tools/**)
Bash(pwsh check-errors.ps1)
